_comment: Dev-Doc Light -> Excalidraw/roughjs (hand-drawn). Card fills are the deck's node tints (steel/teal/purple); strokes are diagram ink. Labels are Roboto Mono for clarity + coherence with the deck's fonts (see diagram-font decision). roughness is the LIGHTEST hand-drawn setting (restrained, slide-safe). To switch to a true excalidraw handwritten look, set fontFamily to an open handwritten font (Excalifont / Virgil, OFL) -- but a non-mono font breaks the char-count width measure, so add opentype.js or a Chromium measure first.
